instructions: The owning OpenClaw agent main session remains pilot-in-command.
Pilot records control, evidence, recovery, and lineage refs for the Work Unit.
The main session directly coordinates its own subagents.
constraints: Pilot must not own or lead the Work Unit.
Pilot must not create a hidden orchestrator actor.
A subagent may be recorded only as a direct task of the owner main session.
acceptance_criteria: owner_main_session_ref is present and stable across Work Unit, context packet, and Pilot artifact.
No hidden orchestrator actor ref appears in the positive Pilot artifact.
